data.title: 213 MW Solar Projects(Southern Zone)
data.description: Successfully completed the project within 200 days despite challenging soil conditions that significantly impacted the mounting structure installation. Through meticulous planning, optimized engineering solutions, and seamless cross-functional coordination, the project was delivered safely, efficiently, and on schedule.

data.title: 147.5 MW Solar Projects(Central Zone)
data.description: Despite complex site execution challenges, the project was delivered successfully through strategic planning, optimized engineering practices, specialized construction techniques, and seamless collaboration among all project stakeholders.

data.title: 210 MW Renewable Portfolio (Northern Zone)
data.description: Renfra has a proven track record of working on multi-technology projects, including strong grid integration and power evacuation systems. This has been showcased in the execution of 160 MW (consisting of 2 PSS) Solar Projects along with a 50 MW Wind Projects in a single location

data.title: 49.5 MW Wind Projects – Installation and O&M (Trichy)
data.description:
With an ever-growing portfolio in the installation of wind turbines, Renfra has created a hallmark in the industry by commissioning WTGs in less than 120 days! 

This is evident in our projects across Trichy, Tamil Nadu, where 3.3MW WTGs were successfully completed in an average of 120 days per WTG, thus demonstrating our capability to deliver large-scale projects with speed, precision, and strict adherence to quality and safety standards.

data.title: Advanced Predictive Maintenance & Asset Management
data.description:
Our comprehensive maintenance strategy includes:



  1. Blade cleaning and WTG preventive maintenance 
  2. USS (33 kV) transmission line maintenance 
  3. PSS (110 kV) substation maintenance with optimized scheduling 


We leverage AI-enabled drone technology for real-time monitoring of:



  • Blade health and performance 
  • USS and PSS transformer conditions 
  • Critical points across 33 kV transmission lines 

This approach helps reduce line losses, control reactive power, and improve overall system efficiency.


All grid-commissioned turbines undergo:



  • Handover-Takeover (HOTO) process 
  • Submission of Lifetime Files (LTF) 

Completed within 7 days of grid commissioning, ensuring a smooth transition to operations and full documentation compliance.

data.title: 67.4 MW Renewable Portfolio (Northern Zone)
data.description: Renfra Energy has successfully executed landmark renewable energy projects that demonstrate excellence in engineering, project management, and timely delivery. Our signature developments showcase expertise in large-scale solar, wind, and hybrid power infrastructure, supported by robust grid connectivity and seamless project execution.

data.title: 462.35 MW Solar O&M
data.description:
We manage a diverse portfolio of solar assets, ensuring maximum uptime, optimized performance, and long-term reliability through proactive maintenance and advanced monitoring.

Renfra Energy currently oversees 462.35 megawatts of operational solar capacity across multiple regions, delivering consistent energy output and value to stakeholders.

data.title: 3.42 MWh Battery Energy Storage (BESS)
data.description:
Renfra is one of the very few companies in the region to successfully install and operate Battery Energy Storage Systems in one of its project sites as a pilot project. This remains as a significant milestone with the erection and installation within 7 days in addition to the hybrid plant (BESS + Solar) to have been fully commissioned in a record 60 days.

 

Further to this successful feat, Renfra is actively pursuing the erection of additional 5.015 MWh in BESS projects in 2026-27 alone.
